checks.name: independent portable-path re-audit
checks.postcondition: PASS: a fresh independent re-audit accepted the repaired repository-local evidence contract, including portable paths, the non-self-referential source aggregate, retained failed-attempt provenance, addressable bounded receipts, typed contradiction results, and precise impact routing.

checks.name: post-commit repository-path and focused verifier checks
checks.postcondition: bun run check:repository-paths and bun run check:hgi-206 passed against the semantic commit; the focused verifier binds the 31-path digest, source aggregate, candidate, results, and observations identities.

checks.name: post-commit type and full repository verification
checks.postcondition: The HGI-206 type/test checks and bun run verification passed, including repository-path/types, quality workflow, documentation/runbook, Effect language-service, lint/format, skill/workflow tests, both Knip graphs, and workspace typecheck/build tasks.

checks.name: canonical local release graph
checks.postcondition: A sequential bun run release:check -- --ci completed all 9 ordered local checks: verification, tests, builds, docs validation, packed SDK, downstream consumer, API smoke, docs browser, and changeset status.

checks.name: retained concurrent release-check failure
checks.postcondition: The earlier concurrent release-check failure is retained as an orchestration concurrency fault; it is not attributed to the accepted HGI-206 semantic tree and is not used as a successful verification result.

checks.name: semantic publication readback
checks.postcondition: Before this validation artifact, local HEAD and origin/main both resolved to c2f41c10dca141c7cb7e066b3a2bff48048101fc; this receipt is a separate closeout commit.

rollback: Revert the HGI-206 validation closeout commit, then semantic commit c2f41c10dca141c7cb7e066b3a2bff48048101fc; retain the candidate, source manifest, result/observation evidence, failed independent attempt, and the retained concurrent-failure provenance.
limitations: The acceptance evidence is repository-local and target-specific; it does not establish a future epoch or independent result beyond the recorded re-audit.
The retained concurrent failure is orchestration evidence, not a defect diagnosis for the accepted semantic tree.
nonClaims: No version, tag, hosted release, registry publication, deployment, provider access, public-site availability, recovery operation, or external consumer outcome was performed or established.
Local repository, packed-consumer, API, browser, and release-graph checks do not prove provider, publication, release, or production actuality.
